why_required: The lab needs a reproducible Python interface rather than manual GUI inspection.
The trial must expose locally readable data after the updater download.
Portfolio Candidate 002 is blocked primarily by survivorship bias.
Delisted symbols must have historical OHLCV
The runner needs point-in-time eligibility and exit handling.
The two-year trial limit must be carried into all downstream decisions.
Probe outputs must be auditable without storing excessive provider data.
